title: Curse Of The Warden
description: Those who perished at the hands of the Warden will come back to life to create chaos.
body:
### Curse of the Warden

### Fabric/Forge


Those who perished at the hands of the Warden will come back to life to create chaos.

As you know the Warden attacks every mob that moves, so this mod will change the Warden a little bit.

When its about to kill a mob, then the killed creature will not die, instead its hp will be restored and it will be "cursed".

Cursed mobs are aggressive to everything, except the Warden and other cursed creatures.

Their skin will get dark bluish, so its easy to distinguish them from others.

The Warden won't attack these cursed mobs.
